_comment: Demo-only snapshot of the custom-detector registry. Baked into the static Cloudflare mirror by web-app/scripts/assemble-cf-demo.mjs, which filters it to detectors that actually have a demo output and serves it at /api/custom-scripts. Regenerate when detectors change: PYTHONPATH=tools/python python tools/python/gen_demo_registry.py. The live VM builds this registry live via scan(); only the backend-less mirror needs it.

detectors.name: curated_band_bass
detectors.label: Bass band (curated)
detectors.description: Bass presence: energy gate on 60–250 Hz of the full mix.

detectors.name: curated_band_highmids
detectors.label: High mids band (curated)
detectors.description: High-mids presence: energy gate on 2–6 kHz of the full mix.

detectors.name: curated_band_highs
detectors.label: Highs band (curated)
detectors.description: Highs presence: energy gate on 6 kHz–Nyquist of the full mix.

detectors.name: curated_band_lowmids
detectors.label: Low mids band (curated)
detectors.description: Low-mids presence: energy gate on 250–500 Hz of the full mix.

detectors.name: curated_band_mids
detectors.label: Mids band (curated)
detectors.description: Mids presence: energy gate on 500–2000 Hz of the full mix.

detectors.name: curated_band_subbass
detectors.label: Sub-bass band (curated)
detectors.description: Sub-bass presence: energy gate on 20–60 Hz of the full mix.

detectors.name: curated_bass_pattern
detectors.label: Bass pattern (curated)
detectors.description: The repeating bass riff: bass-stem onsets quantized to your confirmed bar grid.

detectors.name: curated_cues
detectors.label: Cues — Other (curated)
detectors.description: Standout one-off sounds (chimes/stabs/FX) on the other Demucs stem.

detectors.name: curated_cues_guitar
detectors.label: Cues — Guitar (curated)
detectors.description: Standout one-off sounds on the guitar Demucs stem (htdemucs_6s).

detectors.name: curated_cues_piano
detectors.label: Cues — Piano (curated)
detectors.description: Standout one-off sounds on the piano Demucs stem (htdemucs_6s).

detectors.name: curated_drum_pattern
detectors.label: Drum pattern (curated)
detectors.description: The repeating drum groove: drum-stem onsets quantized to the 16th-note grid.

detectors.name: curated_drum_pattern_grid
detectors.label: Drum pattern (curated, your grid)
detectors.description: The repeating drum groove, quantized to your confirmed bar grid (no All-In-One needed).

detectors.name: curated_drum_sections
detectors.label: Drum sections (LoCoMotif)
detectors.description: Recurring drum sections from LoCoMotif on the drums stem (coarse; complements the drum pattern).

detectors.name: curated_edm_arrangement
detectors.label: EDM build/drop/breakdown (curated)
detectors.description: Whole-arrangement start/stop: Build (riser), Drop (everything in), Breakdown (everything out).

detectors.name: curated_edm_hats
detectors.label: EDM hi-hats (curated)
detectors.description: Hi-hat / high-percussion presence: energy gate on >8 kHz of the full mix (EDM-focused).

detectors.name: curated_edm_lowend
detectors.label: EDM low end (curated)
detectors.description: Kick + sub-bass presence: energy gate on <150 Hz of the full mix (EDM-focused).

detectors.name: curated_inst_bass
detectors.label: Bass presence (curated)
detectors.description: Bass presence: RMS energy presence of the bass Demucs stem.

detectors.name: curated_inst_drums
detectors.label: Drums presence (curated)
detectors.description: Drums presence: RMS energy presence of the drums Demucs stem.

detectors.name: curated_inst_drums_madmom
detectors.label: Drums onsets — madmom (curated)
detectors.description: Drum start/stop from madmom CNN onset density on the drums stem.

detectors.name: curated_inst_guitar
detectors.label: Guitar presence (curated)
detectors.description: Guitar presence: RMS energy presence of the guitar Demucs stem (htdemucs_6s).

detectors.name: curated_inst_notes_bass
detectors.label: Bass notes (curated)
detectors.description: Bass start/stop from basic-pitch note activity (notes sounding), not energy.

detectors.name: curated_inst_notes_guitar
detectors.label: Guitar notes (curated)
detectors.description: Guitar start/stop from basic-pitch note activity (notes sounding), not energy.

detectors.name: curated_inst_notes_other
detectors.label: Melody notes (curated)
detectors.description: Melody start/stop from basic-pitch note activity (notes sounding), not energy.

detectors.name: curated_inst_notes_piano
detectors.label: Piano notes (curated)
detectors.description: Piano start/stop from basic-pitch note activity (notes sounding), not energy.

detectors.name: curated_inst_notes_vocals
detectors.label: Vocals notes (curated)
detectors.description: Vocals start/stop from basic-pitch note activity (notes sounding), not energy.

detectors.name: curated_inst_other
detectors.label: Melody presence (curated)
detectors.description: Melody presence: RMS energy presence of the other Demucs stem.

detectors.name: curated_inst_piano
detectors.label: Piano presence (curated)
detectors.description: Piano presence: RMS energy presence of the piano Demucs stem (htdemucs_6s).

detectors.name: curated_inst_vocals
detectors.label: Vocals presence (curated)
detectors.description: Vocals presence: RMS energy presence of the vocals Demucs stem.

detectors.name: curated_lyrics
detectors.label: Lyrics (curated)
detectors.description: Per-word (line fallback) vocal timing from the lyrics sidecar on the vocals stem.

detectors.name: curated_note_cues
detectors.label: Note cues — Other (curated)
detectors.description: Short, high-pitched standout notes (plucks/bells/arps) from basic-pitch on the other stem.

detectors.name: curated_note_cues_guitar
detectors.label: Note cues — Guitar (curated)
detectors.description: Short, high-pitched standout notes (plucks/harmonics/stabs) from basic-pitch on the guitar stem.

detectors.name: curated_note_cues_piano
detectors.label: Note cues — Piano (curated)
detectors.description: Short, high-pitched standout notes (top-octave plinks/grace notes) from basic-pitch on the piano stem.

detectors.name: curated_panns
detectors.label: PANNs instruments (curated)
detectors.description: PANNs/AudioSet named instruments on the 'other' stem (secondary, noisy on electronic music).

detectors.name: curated_phrases_msaf
detectors.label: Phrases — MSAF consensus (curated)
detectors.description: Structural phrases where >=3 of the 4 MSAF algorithms (sf/foote/cnmf/olda) agree.

detectors.name: recurring_motif
detectors.label: Recurring motif (other)
detectors.description: Finds a short timbral motif (e.g. a chirp / vocal-chop / FX hook) that recurs on the melodic 'other' stem, by clustering onset-anchored spectrogram patches.

detectors.name: template
detectors.label: Template (every 30 s)
detectors.description: Starter scaffold — emits one boundary every 30 seconds. Copy this file to start your own detector.
